## Requested Rule or Template

Name the finding type, report section, or template wording you want to add.

## Use Case

Who would use this and when?

## Suggested Wording

Use vendor-neutral language and fake examples only.

## Severity Guidance

Suggested default severity:

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Info

Explain why:

## Security and Privacy Check

- [ ] I did not include customer data, private URLs, credentials, cookies, tokens, or sensitive logs.
- [ ] This request is about report generation or redaction, not unauthorized scanning.
